versions.version_description: Lady Gaga, Ariana Grande - Rain On Me https://youtu.be/ugQhauUEcJM. Capo 4th fret. Suggestions are welcome.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
I didn't ask for a free ride[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
I only asked you to show me a real good time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
I never asked for the rainfall[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
At least I showed up, you showed me nothing at all[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
      It's coming down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
      Water like  misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
      It's coming down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
      I'm ready, rain on me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] X4


[Verse 2: Ariana Grande]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Livin' in a world where no one's innocent[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
Oh, but at least we try, mmm[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Gotta live my truth, not keep it bottled in[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
So I don't lose my mind, baby, yeah[/tab]


[Pre-Chor]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
I can feel it on my skin (It's comin' down on me)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
Teardrops on my face (Water like misery)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Let it wash away my sins (It's coming down on me)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Let it wash away, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] X4
[ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Hands up to the sky[/tab]

I'll be your galaxy
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm about to fly[/tab]

Rain on me, tsunami
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Hands up to the sky[/tab]

I'll be your galaxy
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm about to fly[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
Rain on me (Rain on me)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
Rain on me (Rain on me)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
I hear the thunder comin' down[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]
Won't you rain on me?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]
Eh, eh, yeah (Rain on, woo)[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
I hear the thunder comin' down[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]
Won't you rain on me? (Me)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
Eh, eh, yeah[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]
Rain on me[/tab]
